summary: Comprehensive e2e testing of LEXA Lifestyle smart home automation website completed. 95% backend success rate (18/19 tests passed - only /api/packages returns 404). 100% frontend success - all pages, modals, widgets, and admin panel working correctly.

homepage.hero_section: INTEGRATED LUXURY LIVING heading, dark luxury theme, CTA buttons (Find Your Perfect Solution, WhatsApp Us, View Projects)
homepage.solutions_bento_grid: Smart Residential Living, Themed Home Cinemas, Multi-Room Entertainment, Energy-Efficient Living
homepage.calculator_cards: Build Your Package, Explore Rooms, Calculate Cost, Calculate ROI
homepage.smart_project_builder: AI-powered, 8-step guided flow, 650+ smart features, START BUILDING CTA
homepage.experience_centre_cta: 5,000+ sq ft showroom, 32+ Brands, 6 Zones, Book a Visit widget
homepage.footer: Solutions, Services, Company, Quick Links columns, search bar, social icons

header_navigation.nav_links: SOLUTIONS, SERVICES, INTELLIGENCE, PACKAGES, BRANDS, PROJECTS, CATALOGUES, EXPERIENCE
header_navigation.book_consultation_button: Opens ConsultationForm modal with form fields

modals_and_widgets.consultation_form_modal: PASS - Opens from Book Consultation button, has Name, Email, Phone, Message fields
modals_and_widgets.persona_modal: PASS - Opens from Find Your Perfect Solution button, shows Homeowner, Architect, Developer, Business options
modals_and_widgets.command_palette: PASS - Opens with Ctrl+K, search bar, Navigation (Home, My Projects Dashboard, Smart Project Builder, Projects Portfolio, Contact Us, Experience Center)
modals_and_widgets.cookie_consent: PASS - Privacy & Cookies banner with Accept All, Essential Only buttons
modals_and_widgets.ai_chat_widget: VISIBLE - Face icon in bottom right corner
modals_and_widgets.whatsapp_widget: VISIBLE - Green WhatsApp icon in bottom right

key_pages./services: PASS - Full-Service Integration, service categories (Design, Integration)
key_pages./projects: PASS - Portfolio with filter tabs (ALL, RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, VILLA), project cards
key_pages./brands: PASS - 37 Premium Brands, 8 Categories, brand cards (Bang & Olufsen, Bowers & Wilkins, Sonos, KEF)
key_pages./blog: PASS - Smart Living Insights, article categories, article cards
key_pages./contact: PASS - Contact form, Quick Connect (WhatsApp, Call Us), contact info
key_pages./calculator: PASS - PROJECT CALCULATOR 10-step wizard, project type selection
key_pages./packages: PASS - All Packages, Build Custom Package, property type cards, AI Quiz/Cost Calculator/ROI Calculator tools
key_pages./about: PASS - Designed for Excellence, stats, Our Values section
key_pages./consultation: PASS - 3 consultation options (Free Site Visit, Experience Center Tour, Video Consultation)
key_pages./experience-centre: PASS - 5,000+ sq ft showroom, Location, Opening Hours, Book a Private Tour
key_pages./intelligence: PASS - Building Intelligence Platform, 694+ Smart Features, 15 Categories, 40% Energy Savings
key_pages./catalogues: PASS - 4 Documents, Interactive Viewer, Company Profile, Brand Catalogues

admin_panel./admin/login: PASS - Login form with username/password fields
admin_panel./admin/dashboard: PASS - Stats (106 Solutions, 20 Projects, 54 Articles, 37 Brands, 46 Consultations), Quick Actions, extensive sidebar navigation

mobile_view.mobile_tab_bar: HOME, BUILDER, PROJECTS, SERVICES, CONTACT tabs at bottom

action_items: OPTIONAL: Implement /api/packages endpoint if packages API listing is needed (currently packages page works without it)
critical_code_review_comments: All major pages load correctly with dark luxury theme
All modals (ConsultationForm, PersonaModal, CommandPalette) function properly
Admin panel fully operational with correct credentials
All form submissions work (contact, consultation, calculator)
Mobile responsiveness working with tab bar navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive e2e testing completed. All major features verified: Homepage with all sections (Hero, Solutions, Calculator Cards, Projects, Experience Centre CTA, Footer), Header navigation with dropdowns, Book Consultation modal, PersonaModal, Command Palette (Ctrl+K), Cookie Consent, WhatsApp/AI Chat widgets, Admin panel (login and dashboard), Mobile view with tab bar. Only minor issue: /api/packages returns 404 but packages page renders correctly from frontend data.
